profiles.name: American Dominate
profiles.lore:
THE AMERICAN CAESAR
 + Powerful Empire
 + Plentiful Resources
 - Strong Enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY
Recommended for new players

THE AMERICAN DOMINATE is a militarized imperial successor to the grand United States, which fell after it bit off more than it could chew in the horror of WORLD WAR III.

It believes itself to be the only way forward for a fragmented nation, which for so long was divided by ideology and faction that no real sense of brotherhood remains between the Americans of this time. The American Dominate promises security, power, and a means to reclaim America's might through the sacrifice of the “decadent pleasures” of materialism, joined to a renewed submission to the will of God.

Like its Red Enemy, it has been embroiled in the 2ND CIVIL WAR for almost 20 years, after the last president, John Edwards, was assassinated by [CLASSIFIED] in Washington. His son, now “President for Life,” vows to finish what his father started, though few who knew John Edwards would have claimed he had anything but love for the republic, an uncommon virtue in his time.

Taking command of the American Dominate will test the mettle not just of the remnant army, but the will of the American people to endure in the name of civilization itself.

profiles.name: American Revolutionary Front
profiles.lore:
THE RED ENEMY
 + Industrial Heartland
 - Strong Enemies
 - Internal Factionalism
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: MEDIUM

THE AMERICAN REVOLUTIONARY FRONT is a socialist successor to the UNITED STATES, born from the same national collapse that created its Imperial rival. Where the Dominate claims legitimacy through order, inheritance, and divine purpose, the Revolutionary Front claims legitimacy through reconstruction: the belief that the republic failed because its institutions could no longer manage wealth inequality, ethnic tension, and the social dislocation left behind by WORLD WAR III.

The Front does not see the 2ND CIVIL WAR as a rebellion against America, but as the unfinished correction of its failures. Its planners argue that the old economy could no longer survive the age of fusion logistics, orbital industry, and mass displacement without placing strategic production under public control. Its soldiers are told that every city held, every factory restored, and every ration line defended is part of a larger project to build a country that cannot collapse again.

Yet the American Revolutionary Front is not a unified movement. Its command structure is divided between military organizers, civilian councils, labor syndicates, and ideological factions that agree on victory far more easily than they agree on what victory should create. Its enemies call it a red dictatorship in embryo. Its supporters call it the last attempt to liberate America.

Taking command of the American Revolutionary Front means fighting a war of production as much as a war of maneuver. The Front has the manpower, industry, and ideological discipline to defeat the Dominate, but only if it can hold its coalition together long enough to prove that revolution can become more than violence.

profiles.name: European Union
profiles.lore:
DIALECTICAL SINGULARITY
 ++ Superpower Status
 - Strong Enemies
 - Bad Demographics
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY
Recommended for new players

The EUROPEAN ECONOMIC ZONE is not a traditional nation - it is a labyrinthine construct of unimaginable size - whose machinery dwarfs all other governments in the system combined. It has been brought together recently due to the MECHANIST COALESCENCE, a meeting of the worlds' greatest minds in DAVOS, SWITZERLAND.

It claims to be the one true synthesis of all that exists into the one MECHANIST ERUDITION, or, if dissident networks are to be believed, the decompilation of the human mind itself.
It claims to represent the interests of the common man, who, according to the experts, require direction, discipline, and a renewed focus.
It claims, above all, to be what all human civilization is ultimately becoming: an immortal state, invulnerable to conquest, and impervious to rebellion, whose victory is made inevitable by the forces of the universe itself.

For underneath the gaze of the SEVENTEEN, the rules of man are as those of nature. Complete.

profiles.name: India
profiles.lore:
THE GREAT WHEEL TURNS
 ++ Superpower Status
 - High Population Density
 - Low literacy
OVERALL RATING: VERY EASY
Recommended for new players

INDIA, while recently ascendant to Superpower Status, is not as invincible as it seems. Regional separatism and corruption sap the vital nourishment from which India derrives its strength. Furthermore, PAKISTAN is still at large, and poses a threat to the security of India's population.

INDIA boasts the highest population in the world by a large margin, after China ripped itself apart because of the War, allowing India to project power like never before in its history. However, India has never been unified like it is now, so troublesome times lie ahead even considering the good circumstances.

profiles.name: United COlonies
profiles.lore:
MAYFLOWER COMPACT
 + Stronger than neighbors
 - Space based civilization
 - Low population
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

The UNITED COLONIES represents the vast majority of the colonial possessions of the former United States in the wider Solar System, being comprised primarily of the Armstrong Colony on Luna, and the Olympus colony of Mars.

Under the Republic, these colonies were made safe by the watchful eye of the United States Space Force, which once patrolled the way between Earth and Mars. But when the suzerain was tearing itself apart, its colonies threatened to do likewise, with appendages of the REVOLUTIONARY FRONT in the RED PLANET ALLIANCE and the LUNAR RED ARMY took the chaos as a signal to similarly wreak havoc on the Colonies.

Desperate for order, and unable to tackle the threat alone, the colonies united, and now face the future together, and restore a great American Republic like the days of old.

profiles.name: Thule
profiles.lore:
NAZIS ON THE MOON
 + Expansion opportunities
 + Stable
 - Strong Enemies
 - Space based civilization
 - Low population
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

Being the first of the extraplanetary nations, the LUNA CONFEDERATION is well accustomed to isolation, as for a time it was declared "non-existent" by the United Nations convention on Space Settlement in 2059. Its political history has been similarly placid, with the disgraced "Unity and Prosperity" party holding office with near complete hegemony until 2085.

The Thule National Party was at first a group of extremist thinkers, exiled from Europe during the waning days of its liberal government. They went first to America, and then were exiled again to the Moon, where only their brothers would accept them.

Perhaps that wasn't the greatest idea, or maybe it was. If you were to ask such a question today in one of Germania's habitats, you might find yourself mysteriously ceasing to exist due to strange, as of yet unknown cosmic phenomena.

THULE, as it is now, is utterly and fanatically devoted to the reversal of the "GREAT BETRAYAL" that the people of Europe have suffered at the hands of their leadership, who, according to the venerable Supreme Leader, are part of a great scheme to destroy Europe and her people.

profiles.name: Indonesia
profiles.lore:
EASTERN CRESCENT
 + Stronger than neighbors
 + High population
 - Scarce resources
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

INDONESIA outclasses all of its local rivals in terms of population, however has always been behind the curve in development. Now, without either the Americans or Chinese breathing down their neck, Indonesia has a great opportunity to exploit the power vacuum and become the regional hegemon it has always wanted to be.

profiles.name: Brazil
profiles.lore:
EQUATORIAL ECONOMIC ZONE
 + High population
 ? Isolated
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY

BRAZIL's happenings have historically been tied to that of the United States, but with the former no longer in existence, Brazil stands at a fork in the historical road. Brazil could go with the times, completing its transformation into an EU satellite, or it could go its own way, and establish a new empire in South America.

profiles.name: Iran
profiles.lore:
ISLAMIC THUNDERDOME
 + Expansion opportunities
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

The collapse of global order after WORLD WAR III allowed many nations to establish themselves in a way unthinkable before, and this includes those in Earth's powderkeg: the Middle East.

IRAN is one of three powers attempting to establish dominion over the heartland of Islam, and must outcompete its rivals if it wants to survive this century.

profiles.name: EGYPT
profiles.lore:
ISLAMIC THUNDERDOME
 + Expansion opportunities
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

The collapse of global order after WORLD WAR III allowed many nations to establish themselves in a way unthinkable before, and this includes those in Earth's powderkeg: the Middle East.

EGYPT is one of three powers attempting to establish dominion over the heartland of Islam, and must outcompete its rivals if it wants to survive this century.

profiles.name: Turkety
profiles.lore:
ISLAMIC THUNDERDOME
 + Expansion opportunities
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

The collapse of global order after WORLD WAR III allowed many nations to establish themselves in a way unthinkable before, and this includes those in Earth's powderkeg: the Middle East.

TURKEY is one of three powers attempting to establish dominion over the heartland of Islam, and must outcompete its rivals if it wants to survive this century.

profiles.name: Communist China
profiles.lore:
MIDDLE KINGDOM MADNESS
 + Expansion opportunities
 + High population
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

CHINA was on the cusp of world hegemony for a long time during the 21st century- but always found itself denied its rightful place by the perfidious UNITED STATES. Eager to avenge this grievance, TAIWAN was invaded on March 21, 2062, while the Americans appeared at their weakest. What followed was a grueling disaster for both sides, and in the end, neither would claim victory.

After the war, China broke apart into many warring factions, as it often does. However, a small group of fanatics loyal to the CCP regained control over the capital and its surrounding territory, eager to reclaim dominion over the lost Empire.

profiles.name: Republic of China
profiles.lore:
MIDDLE KINGDOM MADNESS
 + Expansion opportunities
 + High population
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

TAIWAN was in many ways the catalyst for WORLD WAR III, being constantly bullied by the mainland until March 21, 2062, while the Americans appeared at their weakest. What followed was a grueling disaster for both sides, and in the end, neither would claim victory.

After the war, China broke apart into many warring factions, as it often does. Taiwan initially tried to stay out of the fighting, but was soon roped in by a reborn REPUBLIC OF CHINA in Guangdong, and has joined with nearby provinces to return order and justice to China under their own banner.

Of course, the CCP's remnants will not allow that to happen if they can, and are actively working to prevent CHINA from unifying under any flag other than their own.

profiles.name: Russia
profiles.lore:
MOTHERLAND UNDER SIEGE
 + Abundant resources
 ? Unreliable allies
 -- Very strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

Ever since the fall of the SOVIET UNION, Russia has been in a steep decline, complete collapse only staved off by a series of autocratic leaders. In the Early 21st Century, Vladimir Putin embarked on a campaign of expansion to ensure the Russian heartland could not be threatened, but even he could not have envisioned the tribulation Russia would soon endure.

WORLD WAR III was a mixed bag for the Russians, as they did not gain anything from the war, they did successfully realign themselves against the rising EUROPEAN UNION with the UNITED STATES, but with the fall of the latter and apotheosis of the former, Russia finds itself in a predicament whose magnitude reaches even the winter of 1941.

Russia's diplomats have produced a hasty solution: the QUADRILATERAL ALLIANCE, borne primarily of convenience and mutual enemy, to pursue the interests of the remaining independent states in Europe against those who claim to represent them. Only time will tell whether or not this alliance will be able to thwart the Council's plans.

profiles.name: Italy
profiles.lore:
DECAY AND DEATH
 - Bad demographics
 - Strong Enemies
 ? Unreliable allies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

The BABY BUST of the early 21st century hit the entire world, but nowhere greater than East Asia and Southern Europe. ITALY find itself in the slump of this decline even 50 years after its conclusion, and is now beset upon by hostile powers intent on breaking it apart.

To the north, the transforming European Union eyes the "traitorous" countries of the east and south with barely constrained malice, and all around it the shifting balance of power has created a very unstable geopolitical environment, to say the least.

For the time, Italy has found solace in the QUADRILATERAL ALLIANCE, but for how long can Russia be trusted? Few imagine for long, but the question remains of how Italy will survive these times without succumbing to the ailments which have already claimed so many.

profiles.name: Japan
profiles.lore:
SPLENDID ISOLATION
 -- Very bad demographics
 ? Isolated
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

JAPAN's Imperial days are long behind it, and the nation has enjoyed managed decline for almost a century now. Even the chaos of WORLD WAR III did little to disrupt the passivity of the Japanese Republic. However, times are changing, and the Japanese are not fools, they see the trouble on the horizon, and so in 2090, Japan's military was reformed and brought back to the forefront of the nation's agenda.

Now, Japan finds itself alone, but free, and can choose to pursue whatever objectives it sees fit.

profiles.name: Mars ANcapistan
profiles.lore:
FREE ASSOCIATION
 -- Very low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Stable
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL
This country is recommended for new players

Early Mars was, for the most part, driven by the principle of free association. As a result, humanity has colonized this barren rock in only 50 years. Unfortunately, the lazy socialists and incompetent aristocrats have already siezed upon the opportunity provided by prosperity, and undermined the very principles which created it, everywhere except here.
The FREE ENTERPRISE ZONE was established by people with a common ambition: to make mankind truly free, not the liberation of communism, or the "freedom" of liberalism, but, as he is in nature, absolutely free to pursue his ambitions insofar as they do not oppress others.

profiles.name: Jehovas witnesses
profiles.lore:
ULTIMATE PILGRIMAGE
 -- Very low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Stable
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL
This country is recommended for new players

The Jehovas' Witnesses absolute worshipfulness and loyalty to Jehova cost them alot in the past few decades. The organization in control of the religion, the Watchtower, declared the beginning of the TIME OF TRIBULATION, and indicated the safe haven for the faithful would be the Red Planet. This caused a schism within the congregation, as many could not let go of their ties to this world, and so the chosen set off to build their greatest kingdom hall on a new world, unmolested by Satan and his demons.

profiles.name: Mars France
profiles.lore:
ETERNAL TURMOIL
 -- Very low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

The French cannot catch a break it seems, with their homeland destroyed and the LUNA CONFEDERATION under the control of a cabal of lunatics, the last bastion of French Culture is the little-known colony of RED AQUITAINE, a weak and small backwater on the fringes of the western basin.
Even then, the French cannot seem to decide what kind of government they want, and Red Aquiatine has seen many regime changes even in its short history. Now, however, the stakes are higher, as the Germans are getting ambitious.
At least in that sense, things are going back to the way they used to be.

profiles.name: Mars Germanyt
profiles.lore:
LAST MAN STANDING
 -- Very low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Stable
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL
This country is recommended for new players

GERMANY has a tumultuous history full of great victories and terrible defeats, but one of the often overlooked parts of this is that of the German Empire, which united a group of divided principalities and built an empire to rival the might of the British at the height of their power.
Like the rest of Europe, Germany was transformed into something we no longer recognize as the Fatherland, and thus new living space is required for the survival of the German people.
NEW POMMERANIA was a settlement on Mars built for the explicit purpose of providing safehaven for those fleeing political pursecution in Old Germany, and those that flocked to the promise of a new, traditional Germany will not be let down.

profiles.name: Mars roman empire
profiles.lore:
HEIR TO THE EMPIRE
 -- Very low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Stable
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL
This country is recommended for new players

The ROMAN EMPIRE was the greatest civilization the world has ever known, lasting for over one thousand years, only being destroyed by the petty betrayal of its allies. Many nations have tried to recreate the glory of Rome but so far none have succeeded- and that is because they were not willing to go far enough to achieve victory.
We descendants of the Roman legacy have done away with our old cultures, beliefs, and ideas in order to understand and wield the power the Romans once held, and although our journey has only just begun, we are absolutely committed to the mission.

profiles.name: League of Blood
profiles.lore:
RED REVENGE
 - Very low population
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

The RED PLANET ALLIANCE is a chaotic alliance of sectarian, broadly left-wing interests advocating for an overthrow of capitalist imperialism and a transition towards a socialist state of being. Like its counterparts on Earth and Mars, it's enemy is a reactionary force who seeks to prevent this from happening.

According to the League, the Red cause is just not because its victory is inevitable, though it is, as prophesized by the intellectual titans of the past, but because it is the natural and right state of human existence. In space, however, this doctrine is more difficult to enforce, since a single lapse in judgement can render a colony in grave danger. As a result, certain undesirable restrictions on individual liberty must unfortunately be enacted so as to ensure a smooth transition into Utopia, which will be any day now according to our great and noble leader!

profiles.name: The Protectorate
profiles.lore:
LIKE FATHERLAND, LIKE SON
 - Low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Weak enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL
This country is recommended for new players

Following the disaster of WORD WAR III, and the CCP's loss of power, the few Chinese colonies on the moon and mars were left with decaying infrastructure, poor population, and even poorer finances, having long relied upon the Party's saber-rattling to keep enemies at bay, and the results were disastrous.

THE PROTECTORATE is the last of the colonies to retain its power, and finds itself in a tense standoff with Manchu and Indochinese rebels, with the additional threat of future tensions with the UNITED COLONIES, once they stabilize the situation in the northern hemisphere.

profiles.name: Europan Coalition
profiles.lore:
FROZEN OCEAN FIASCO
 - Low population
 - Strong enemies
 ? Space based civilization
 + Abundant water
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

EUROPA has always been a fracticious environment, due to the disconnected, subterranean nature of the Moon's habitation ecosystem. The only thing preventing all-out war for the last few decades was the USSF, now relegated to a defensive role in UNITED COLONIES drydocks.

Following this realization, the myriad colonies of Europa organized into cliques representing their interests. The EUROPAN COALITION represents the interests of the corporations and elites of the old JUPITER AUTHORITY systems, and is eager to uproot the disorganized peasants who dare threaten their supremacy. But that will not be easy, as there are many others on Europa who are vying to do the same.

profiles.name: EUropan Populists
profiles.lore:
FROZEN OCEAN FIASCO
 - Low population
 - Strong enemies
 ? Space based civilization
 + Abundant water
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

EUROPA has always been a fracticious environment, due to the disconnected, subterranean nature of the Moon's habitation ecosystem. The only thing preventing all-out war for the last few decades was the USSF, now relegated to a defensive role in UNITED COLONIES drydocks.

Following this realization, the myriad colonies of Europa organized into cliques representing their interests. The EUROPAN POPULAR FRONT represents the laboring and entrepreneurial classes of Europa, and hopes to establish a free and fair Europan government that does not squash the interests of the 'small people'. But that will not be easy, as there are many others on Europa who are vying to do the same.

profiles.name: Europa Communists
profiles.lore:
FROZEN OCEAN FIASCO
 - Low population
 - Strong enemies
 ? Space based civilization
 + Abundant water
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

EUROPA has always been a fracticious environment, due to the disconnected, subterranean nature of the Moon's habitation ecosystem. The only thing preventing all-out war for the last few decades was the USSF, now relegated to a defensive role in UNITED COLONIES drydocks.

Following this realization, the myriad colonies of Europa organized into cliques representing their interests. The JOVIAN SOCIALIST FEDERATION represents the intellectuals, bureaucrats, and internet classes of Europan society, and is eager to enlighten the reactionary and bourgeois elements of their enemies. But that will not be easy, as there are many others on Europa who are vying to do the same.

profiles.name: Europa Fascists
profiles.lore:
FROZEN OCEAN FIASCO
 - Low population
 - Strong enemies
 ? Space based civilization
 + Abundant water
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

EUROPA has always been a fracticious environment, due to the disconnected, subterranean nature of the Moon's habitation ecosystem. The only thing preventing all-out war for the last few decades was the USSF, now relegated to a defensive role in UNITED COLONIES drydocks.

Following this realization, the myriad colonies of Europa organized into cliques representing their interests. The EUROPAN IMPERIUM represents the interests of the conglomerates and institutions of pre-war Europa, and is eager to revitalize the moon's society by expunging those who are unfit to contribute to Europan society. But that will not be easy, as there are many others on Europa who are vying to do the same.

profiles.name: Europa Kingdom
profiles.lore:
FROZEN OCEAN FIASCO
 - Low population
 - Strong enemies
 ? Space based civilization
 + Abundant water
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

EUROPA has always been a fracticious environment, due to the disconnected, subterranean nature of the Moon's habitation ecosystem. The only thing preventing all-out war for the last few decades was the USSF, now relegated to a defensive role in UNITED COLONIES drydocks.

Following this realization, the myriad colonies of Europa organized into cliques representing their interests. The KINGDOM OF EUROPA represents the interests of a new set of Nobles who established themselves in opposition to the EUROPAN COALITION, and they are eager to prove their superiority to their former allies. But that will not be easy, as there are many others on Europa who are vying to do the same.

profiles.name: TRICORP
profiles.lore:
CORPORATE KINGDOM
 - Low population
 ? Space based civilization
 ? Isolated
 + Abundant resources
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY

TRICORP™ is the creation of the recent merger of Ganymede's "Big Three" corporations into one Megaconglomerate, established for the expressed purpose of monopolizing the wealth of ALL of Jupiter. Such behaviors would ordinarily be shut down by international agencies such as the JUPITER AUTHORITY, however, Tricorp™ has a secret backer: the EUROPEAN ECONOMIC ZONE. Why the European Communists would want Tricorp™ to succeed is not known to their executives, but they don't really care. Money is power, and power is all that is real..

profiles.name: IO
profiles.lore:
CELESTIAL FORGE
 - Low population
 ? Space based civilization
 ? Isolated
 + Abundant resources
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY

IO is unique in many ways, but the factor that most intrigues the IO MINING LEAGUE is the extreme volcanism of the Moon. Io's close proximity to Jupiter exerts massive tensile forces on its interior, bringing heavy metals closer to the surface. As a result, Io is a miner's heaven; all sorts of rare and special compounds can be found easily, and in many cases, already molten for extra convenience.

Such an extreme environment attracts interesting people, and those that call Io home can be best likened to dwarves. Life in the Io Mining League consists of long hours of mining and smithing, where everyone must master the art of forging in order for the colony to survive.

profiles.name: Callisto
profiles.lore:
THE FOURTH WHEEL
 - Low population
 ? Space based civilization
 ? Isolated
 + Stable
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY

Every one of the Gallilean Moons has something great about it. Io has minerals, Ganymede has gravity, and Europa has water, but what does Callisto have?

Callisto has something none of the other moons have: peace. Callisto has not known a single instance of combat since its colonization, and those who call Callisto home form a peaceful and cohesive society known as the CALLISTAN CONFEDERACY.

Perhaps it is because Callisto has nothing obvious to offer that those who came anyway were of greater virtue, or perhaps the lack of resources engendered a need for discipline? Regardless, while Callisto may not be glamourous, it is not to be underestimated.

profiles.name: Venusian United Colonies
profiles.lore:
AFTER THE MOUSE UTOPIA
 - Low Population
 -- Venus Start
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

VENUS was not colonized by ordinary people, but instead the greatest and worst of the old Earth. On one hand, there were scientists and engineers devoted to the ambition of terraforming the inhospitable world into a second Eden for humanity, and on the other there were those who admired the secrecy and seclusion Venus provided.

This, in combination with the manifested Behavioral Synch of the Venusian colonists, due to their cramped conditions and isolation from Earth, resulted in disastrous consequences. For a time, peace was maintained through force, but that could not stop the crazed masses from tearing each other apart. Venus is a shadow of shadows, perpetual decline imminent, and each colony has taken drastic measures to avert the crisis.

In order to stay sane, we have instituted policy as if the Union were still intact, and have taken great effort to persuade our people as such. We are the only ones who have yet to fall to the mania, and there are fewer of us each day. God help us!

profiles.name: Black Site Gamma-Lambda-Psi
profiles.lore:
MAINFRAME OF MINDS
 - Low Population
 -- Venus Start
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

VENUS was not colonized by ordinary people, but instead the greatest and worst of the old Earth. On one hand, there were scientists and engineers devoted to the ambition of terraforming the inhospitable world into a second Eden for humanity, and on the other there were those who admired the secrecy and seclusion Venus provided.

The Central Intelligence Agency has used Venus for experiments of dubious morality for some time. We are fortunate that the MR-CONTRA experiments have borne fruit by allowing us to perform the SUBLIMATION TECHNIQUE to rewrite the human mind as we see fit.

In the time since MR-Contra's conclusion, we have used its gifts to build a machine of Minds across Nedosuriland; in our perfect symphony we have created new life, and the only life which is ready to survive the universe's threats.

profiles.name: Venus Enterprise Zone
profiles.lore:
CORPORATE CONTROLLERS
 - Low Population
 -- Venus Start
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

The few corporations which sponsored colonial ventures to Earth's twin were not happy to find that the planet did not have many redeeming qualities for colonial exploitation, unlike mars. Habitation, in order to be safe, had to be built aboard massive airships in the upper atmosphere, where water vapor still lurked and could be collected in massive nets. These proved to be expensive, but there were still those who took such risks.

After the collapse of the United States, some companies with great investment in Venus chose to migrate to the locations of their ventures instead of dealing with either side. These companies arrived to a scene of terror and misery: the whole world had gone mad from the chaos of isolation and confinement on the airships. Order was only restored through the replacement of civil governance with that of corporate mercenaries and tough discipline.

Now, the time has come to bring prosperity and recreational fusion reactors to all of mankind!

profiles.name: Venerean Federation
profiles.lore:
NO REST FOR THE RUSSIANS
 - Low Population
 -- Venus Start
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

Russian history is a series of blunders in which many people die. This is Russia's greatest strength, and weakness. It has given us great determination and skill in resisting the inevitable, and now it once again proves very useful.

Russia's VENERA exploration missions to Venus uncovered a world with no equal, the ultimate in harsh climates, in desolate frontiers; in short, the perfect place for the Russian people. As such, great effort was made by the motherland to send expeditions to this place, to make it livable. This investment was intended to give Russia greater bargaining power against Europe back home, by showing the Europeans we would be willing to endure any hardship to win, should they try the unthinkable.

Instead, the colonists were trapped by history, as is so often the case. America's achilles heel finally broke the behemoth, and the rest of the Solar System found itself cut off from Earth- but we have endured this before, and we will once again learn from this crisis and be better for it!

profiles.name: Venus Intelligence
profiles.lore:
NO REST FOR THE RUSSIANS
 - Low Population
 -- Venus Start
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

Russian history is a series of blunders in which many people die. This is Russia's greatest strength, and weakness. It has given us great determination and skill in resisting the inevitable, and now it once again proves very useful.

During a raid by Spetsnaz forces against BLACKSITE GAMMA-LAMBDA-PSI of the CIA, we captured documents indicating the Americans had learned the Language of the Human Mainframe: they could now rewrite the mind like a machine.

Knowing this, we naturally questioned how long they had this information, and whether or not we had been programmed already. We came to the realization that all of our thoughts were influenced by the CIA's mental weapons technology, and that the only way to liberate ourselves from their control was through our own SUBLIMATION PROTOCOL.

When we came to the Federation Council with this understanding, they rejected it (predictably), as they had become too entrapped within the CIA's mind-prison. So, naturally, we took over the secluded Rebeyecuian Range and transformed its population into the new and improved HOMO ROBOTICUS!

profiles.name: Saturnian League
profiles.lore:
ANTI-CORPORATE CRUSADE
 ? Isolated
 ? Low Population
 - Low Stability
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: MODERATE

The arrival of prototype cryo-sleeper CRONUS I to the Saturn System in 2074 would be the last conquest of the UNITED STATES SPACE FORCE, indeed, the Union would fall only a few years after the Titanian colonists awoke from their decades long slumber. Fortunately, Titan proved more hosptable than initially anticipated, as preliminary surveys revealed a great wealth of ice hidden beneath the surface, which would prove useful in constructing the PATRIOT'S SCHILD outpost on the southern shores of Titan's Methan seas.

However, not all was peaceful, as the retreat of the USSF to its Martian and Lunar holdings emboldened the JOVIAN CORPORATIONS to restart their rampant exploitation- and they were very keen to open up the emerging Saturnian market. In 2086, TRICORP sponsored a "business venture" on Enceladus, which quickly turned into an Empire-building project similar to that of Europa, where the companies began buying influence within the emerging Saturnian legislature. Fortunately, the Titanians found resolve where the Europans could not, and united to drive out the undue influence of the emerging megacorporation, allowing for the establishment of the SATURNIAN LEAGUE OF WORLDS - a project with the aim of ridding the ringed planet of all corporate influence.

profiles.name: Beijing Government
profiles.lore:
MIDDLE KINGDOM MADNESS
 + Expansion opportunities
 + High population
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

CHINA spent much of the 21st century tantalizingly close to dethroning the UNITED STATES from its throne of hegemony, but always just far enough to be unable to take the risk.

That was, until March 21, 2062 when a series of chaotic uprisings in America and its colonies convined Beijing that the former was sufficiently distacted for a "lightning strike" against Taiwan. Unfortunately, that did not go to plan, for China or its enemy.

WORLD WAR III did not end because of a peace treaty, it ended when China as a unified entity ceased to exist, and thus could no longer convince its allies to continue the fight against even a fractured NATO. Yet Red China endures, clinging to its last palace, and keenly eyeing the lands of the breakway states, knowing that the kingdom, long divided, must unite once again.

profiles.name: Lunar Red Army
profiles.lore:
RED REVENGE
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

The LUNAR RED ARMY is a chaotic alliance of sectarian, broadly left-wing interests advocating for an overthrow of capitalist imperialism and a transition towards a socialist state of being. Like its counterparts on Earth and Mars, it's enemy is a reactionary force who seeks to prevent this from happening.

According to the Red Army, the Red cause is just not because its victory is inevitable, though it is, as prophesized by the intellectual titans of the past, but because it is the natural and right state of human existence. In space, however, this doctrine is more difficult to enforce, since a single lapse in judgement can render a colony in grave danger. As a result, certain undesirable restrictions on individual liberty must unfortunately be enacted so as to ensure a smooth transition into Utopia, which will be any day now according to our great and noble leader!

profiles.name: Cascadia
profiles.lore:
SILICON VALLEY
 + High Literacy
 + Developed
 - Strong Enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: MODERATE

Under the Republic, the western seaboard flourished as a hub of development and ingenuity unsurpassed in history. After the tradgedy of 2081, however, it seemd all hope of a bright and unified future of science and technology was lost to infighting of ideologies not terribly concerned with matters of science.

THE TECHNATE aims to change that. Whereas the Dominate will speak of unity through strength, and the Front will speak of unity through equity, the Technate answers with the rejection of ideology altogether: favoring a "rational synthesis" of the material universe into a political paradigm which will for all time be unsurpassable.

After the 4th Corporate-Science council in San Francisco, it is evident that the reignition of hostilites between the Dominate and Front is inevitable with a 97.5446% degree of certainty. As a result, the Technate may need to involve itself more significantly in the 2nd Civil War than it originally intended. However, other leaders suggest that the correct approach is to leave the "dead Earth" behind altogether. It remains to be seen what the Technate's future holds.

profiles.name: Belter Freeholds
profiles.lore:
JOLLY ROGER'S RETURN

The Asteroid Belt was neglected by Earth even before it was consumed by the fires of the war. The people who came here, looking for a better life, have learned to do whatever it takes to survive, and the found solution was to raid the commercial lines between Earth, Mars and Juptier to steal supplies and bring them back to develop the Freeholds.

selectable.name: American Dominate
selectable.lore:
THE AMERICAN CAESAR
 + Powerful Empire
 + Plentiful Resources
 - Strong Enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY
Recommended for new players

THE AMERICAN DOMINATE is a militarized imperial successor to the grand United States, which fell after it bit off more than it could chew in the horror of WORLD WAR III.

It believes itself to be the only way forward for a fragmented nation, which for so long was divided by ideology and faction that no real sense of brotherhood remains between the Americans of this time. The American Dominate promises security, power, and a means to reclaim America's might through the sacrifice of the “decadent pleasures” of materialism, joined to a renewed submission to the will of God.

Like its Red Enemy, it has been embroiled in the 2ND CIVIL WAR for almost 20 years, after the last president, John Edwards, was assassinated by [CLASSIFIED] in Washington. His son, now “President for Life,” vows to finish what his father started, though few who knew John Edwards would have claimed he had anything but love for the republic, an uncommon virtue in his time.

Taking command of the American Dominate will test the mettle not just of the remnant army, but the will of the American people to endure in the name of civilization itself.

selectable.name: American Revolutionary Front
selectable.lore:
THE RED ENEMY
 + Industrial Heartland
 - Strong Enemies
 - Internal Factionalism
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: MEDIUM

THE AMERICAN REVOLUTIONARY FRONT is a socialist successor to the UNITED STATES, born from the same national collapse that created its Imperial rival. Where the Dominate claims legitimacy through order, inheritance, and divine purpose, the Revolutionary Front claims legitimacy through reconstruction: the belief that the republic failed because its institutions could no longer manage wealth inequality, ethnic tension, and the social dislocation left behind by WORLD WAR III.

The Front does not see the 2ND CIVIL WAR as a rebellion against America, but as the unfinished correction of its failures. Its planners argue that the old economy could no longer survive the age of fusion logistics, orbital industry, and mass displacement without placing strategic production under public control. Its soldiers are told that every city held, every factory restored, and every ration line defended is part of a larger project to build a country that cannot collapse again.

Yet the American Revolutionary Front is not a unified movement. Its command structure is divided between military organizers, civilian councils, labor syndicates, and ideological factions that agree on victory far more easily than they agree on what victory should create. Its enemies call it a red dictatorship in embryo. Its supporters call it the last attempt to liberate America.

Taking command of the American Revolutionary Front means fighting a war of production as much as a war of maneuver. The Front has the manpower, industry, and ideological discipline to defeat the Dominate, but only if it can hold its coalition together long enough to prove that revolution can become more than violence.

selectable.name: Beijing Government
selectable.lore:
MIDDLE KINGDOM MADNESS
 + Expansion opportunities
 + High population
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

CHINA spent much of the 21st century tantalizingly close to dethroning the UNITED STATES from its throne of hegemony, but always just far enough to be unable to take the risk.

That was, until March 21, 2062 when a series of chaotic uprisings in America and its colonies convined Beijing that the former was sufficiently distacted for a "lightning strike" against Taiwan. Unfortunately, that did not go to plan, for China or its enemy.

WORLD WAR III did not end because of a peace treaty, it ended when China as a unified entity ceased to exist, and thus could no longer convince its allies to continue the fight against even a fractured NATO. Yet Red China endures, clinging to its last palace, and keenly eyeing the lands of the breakway states, knowing that the kingdom, long divided, must unite once again.

selectable.name: Belter Freeholds
selectable.lore:
JOLLY ROGER'S RETURN

The Asteroid Belt was neglected by Earth even before it was consumed by the fires of the war. The people who came here, looking for a better life, have learned to do whatever it takes to survive, and the found solution was to raid the commercial lines between Earth, Mars and Juptier to steal supplies and bring them back to develop the Freeholds.

selectable.name: Black Site Gamma-Lambda-Psi
selectable.lore:
MAINFRAME OF MINDS
 - Low Population
 -- Venus Start
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

VENUS was not colonized by ordinary people, but instead the greatest and worst of the old Earth. On one hand, there were scientists and engineers devoted to the ambition of terraforming the inhospitable world into a second Eden for humanity, and on the other there were those who admired the secrecy and seclusion Venus provided.

The Central Intelligence Agency has used Venus for experiments of dubious morality for some time. We are fortunate that the MR-CONTRA experiments have borne fruit by allowing us to perform the SUBLIMATION TECHNIQUE to rewrite the human mind as we see fit.

In the time since MR-Contra's conclusion, we have used its gifts to build a machine of Minds across Nedosuriland; in our perfect symphony we have created new life, and the only life which is ready to survive the universe's threats.

selectable.name: Brazil
selectable.lore:
EQUATORIAL ECONOMIC ZONE
 + High population
 ? Isolated
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY

BRAZIL's happenings have historically been tied to that of the United States, but with the former no longer in existence, Brazil stands at a fork in the historical road. Brazil could go with the times, completing its transformation into an EU satellite, or it could go its own way, and establish a new empire in South America.

selectable.name: Callisto
selectable.lore:
THE FOURTH WHEEL
 - Low population
 ? Space based civilization
 ? Isolated
 + Stable
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY

Every one of the Gallilean Moons has something great about it. Io has minerals, Ganymede has gravity, and Europa has water, but what does Callisto have?

Callisto has something none of the other moons have: peace. Callisto has not known a single instance of combat since its colonization, and those who call Callisto home form a peaceful and cohesive society known as the CALLISTAN CONFEDERACY.

Perhaps it is because Callisto has nothing obvious to offer that those who came anyway were of greater virtue, or perhaps the lack of resources engendered a need for discipline? Regardless, while Callisto may not be glamourous, it is not to be underestimated.

selectable.name: Cascadia
selectable.lore:
SILICON VALLEY
 + High Literacy
 + Developed
 - Strong Enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: MODERATE

Under the Republic, the western seaboard flourished as a hub of development and ingenuity unsurpassed in history. After the tradgedy of 2081, however, it seemd all hope of a bright and unified future of science and technology was lost to infighting of ideologies not terribly concerned with matters of science.

THE TECHNATE aims to change that. Whereas the Dominate will speak of unity through strength, and the Front will speak of unity through equity, the Technate answers with the rejection of ideology altogether: favoring a "rational synthesis" of the material universe into a political paradigm which will for all time be unsurpassable.

After the 4th Corporate-Science council in San Francisco, it is evident that the reignition of hostilites between the Dominate and Front is inevitable with a 97.5446% degree of certainty. As a result, the Technate may need to involve itself more significantly in the 2nd Civil War than it originally intended. However, other leaders suggest that the correct approach is to leave the "dead Earth" behind altogether. It remains to be seen what the Technate's future holds.

selectable.name: EGYPT
selectable.lore:
ISLAMIC THUNDERDOME
 + Expansion opportunities
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

The collapse of global order after WORLD WAR III allowed many nations to establish themselves in a way unthinkable before, and this includes those in Earth's powderkeg: the Middle East.

EGYPT is one of three powers attempting to establish dominion over the heartland of Islam, and must outcompete its rivals if it wants to survive this century.

selectable.name: Europan Coalition
selectable.lore:
FROZEN OCEAN FIASCO
 - Low population
 - Strong enemies
 ? Space based civilization
 + Abundant water
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

EUROPA has always been a fracticious environment, due to the disconnected, subterranean nature of the Moon's habitation ecosystem. The only thing preventing all-out war for the last few decades was the USSF, now relegated to a defensive role in UNITED COLONIES drydocks.

Following this realization, the myriad colonies of Europa organized into cliques representing their interests. The EUROPAN COALITION represents the interests of the corporations and elites of the old JUPITER AUTHORITY systems, and is eager to uproot the disorganized peasants who dare threaten their supremacy. But that will not be easy, as there are many others on Europa who are vying to do the same.

selectable.name: Europa Fascists
selectable.lore:
FROZEN OCEAN FIASCO
 - Low population
 - Strong enemies
 ? Space based civilization
 + Abundant water
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

EUROPA has always been a fracticious environment, due to the disconnected, subterranean nature of the Moon's habitation ecosystem. The only thing preventing all-out war for the last few decades was the USSF, now relegated to a defensive role in UNITED COLONIES drydocks.

Following this realization, the myriad colonies of Europa organized into cliques representing their interests. The EUROPAN IMPERIUM represents the interests of the conglomerates and institutions of pre-war Europa, and is eager to revitalize the moon's society by expunging those who are unfit to contribute to Europan society. But that will not be easy, as there are many others on Europa who are vying to do the same.

selectable.name: EUropan Populists
selectable.lore:
FROZEN OCEAN FIASCO
 - Low population
 - Strong enemies
 ? Space based civilization
 + Abundant water
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

EUROPA has always been a fracticious environment, due to the disconnected, subterranean nature of the Moon's habitation ecosystem. The only thing preventing all-out war for the last few decades was the USSF, now relegated to a defensive role in UNITED COLONIES drydocks.

Following this realization, the myriad colonies of Europa organized into cliques representing their interests. The EUROPAN POPULAR FRONT represents the laboring and entrepreneurial classes of Europa, and hopes to establish a free and fair Europan government that does not squash the interests of the 'small people'. But that will not be easy, as there are many others on Europa who are vying to do the same.

selectable.name: European Union
selectable.lore:
DIALECTICAL SINGULARITY
 ++ Superpower Status
 - Strong Enemies
 - Bad Demographics
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY
Recommended for new players

The EUROPEAN ECONOMIC ZONE is not a traditional nation - it is a labyrinthine construct of unimaginable size - whose machinery dwarfs all other governments in the system combined. It has been brought together recently due to the MECHANIST COALESCENCE, a meeting of the worlds' greatest minds in DAVOS, SWITZERLAND.

It claims to be the one true synthesis of all that exists into the one MECHANIST ERUDITION, or, if dissident networks are to be believed, the decompilation of the human mind itself.
It claims to represent the interests of the common man, who, according to the experts, require direction, discipline, and a renewed focus.
It claims, above all, to be what all human civilization is ultimately becoming: an immortal state, invulnerable to conquest, and impervious to rebellion, whose victory is made inevitable by the forces of the universe itself.

For underneath the gaze of the SEVENTEEN, the rules of man are as those of nature. Complete.

selectable.name: Mars France
selectable.lore:
ETERNAL TURMOIL
 -- Very low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

The French cannot catch a break it seems, with their homeland destroyed and the LUNA CONFEDERATION under the control of a cabal of lunatics, the last bastion of French Culture is the little-known colony of RED AQUITAINE, a weak and small backwater on the fringes of the western basin.
Even then, the French cannot seem to decide what kind of government they want, and Red Aquiatine has seen many regime changes even in its short history. Now, however, the stakes are higher, as the Germans are getting ambitious.
At least in that sense, things are going back to the way they used to be.

selectable.name: India
selectable.lore:
THE GREAT WHEEL TURNS
 ++ Superpower Status
 - High Population Density
 - Low literacy
OVERALL RATING: VERY EASY
Recommended for new players

INDIA, while recently ascendant to Superpower Status, is not as invincible as it seems. Regional separatism and corruption sap the vital nourishment from which India derrives its strength. Furthermore, PAKISTAN is still at large, and poses a threat to the security of India's population.

INDIA boasts the highest population in the world by a large margin, after China ripped itself apart because of the War, allowing India to project power like never before in its history. However, India has never been unified like it is now, so troublesome times lie ahead even considering the good circumstances.

selectable.name: Indonesia
selectable.lore:
EASTERN CRESCENT
 + Stronger than neighbors
 + High population
 - Scarce resources
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

INDONESIA outclasses all of its local rivals in terms of population, however has always been behind the curve in development. Now, without either the Americans or Chinese breathing down their neck, Indonesia has a great opportunity to exploit the power vacuum and become the regional hegemon it has always wanted to be.

selectable.name: IO
selectable.lore:
CELESTIAL FORGE
 - Low population
 ? Space based civilization
 ? Isolated
 + Abundant resources
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY

IO is unique in many ways, but the factor that most intrigues the IO MINING LEAGUE is the extreme volcanism of the Moon. Io's close proximity to Jupiter exerts massive tensile forces on its interior, bringing heavy metals closer to the surface. As a result, Io is a miner's heaven; all sorts of rare and special compounds can be found easily, and in many cases, already molten for extra convenience.

Such an extreme environment attracts interesting people, and those that call Io home can be best likened to dwarves. Life in the Io Mining League consists of long hours of mining and smithing, where everyone must master the art of forging in order for the colony to survive.

selectable.name: Iran
selectable.lore:
ISLAMIC THUNDERDOME
 + Expansion opportunities
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

The collapse of global order after WORLD WAR III allowed many nations to establish themselves in a way unthinkable before, and this includes those in Earth's powderkeg: the Middle East.

IRAN is one of three powers attempting to establish dominion over the heartland of Islam, and must outcompete its rivals if it wants to survive this century.

selectable.name: Italy
selectable.lore:
DECAY AND DEATH
 - Bad demographics
 - Strong Enemies
 ? Unreliable allies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

The BABY BUST of the early 21st century hit the entire world, but nowhere greater than East Asia and Southern Europe. ITALY find itself in the slump of this decline even 50 years after its conclusion, and is now beset upon by hostile powers intent on breaking it apart.

To the north, the transforming European Union eyes the "traitorous" countries of the east and south with barely constrained malice, and all around it the shifting balance of power has created a very unstable geopolitical environment, to say the least.

For the time, Italy has found solace in the QUADRILATERAL ALLIANCE, but for how long can Russia be trusted? Few imagine for long, but the question remains of how Italy will survive these times without succumbing to the ailments which have already claimed so many.

selectable.name: Japan
selectable.lore:
SPLENDID ISOLATION
 -- Very bad demographics
 ? Isolated
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

JAPAN's Imperial days are long behind it, and the nation has enjoyed managed decline for almost a century now. Even the chaos of WORLD WAR III did little to disrupt the passivity of the Japanese Republic. However, times are changing, and the Japanese are not fools, they see the trouble on the horizon, and so in 2090, Japan's military was reformed and brought back to the forefront of the nation's agenda.

Now, Japan finds itself alone, but free, and can choose to pursue whatever objectives it sees fit.

selectable.name: Europa Communists
selectable.lore:
FROZEN OCEAN FIASCO
 - Low population
 - Strong enemies
 ? Space based civilization
 + Abundant water
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

EUROPA has always been a fracticious environment, due to the disconnected, subterranean nature of the Moon's habitation ecosystem. The only thing preventing all-out war for the last few decades was the USSF, now relegated to a defensive role in UNITED COLONIES drydocks.

Following this realization, the myriad colonies of Europa organized into cliques representing their interests. The JOVIAN SOCIALIST FEDERATION represents the intellectuals, bureaucrats, and internet classes of Europan society, and is eager to enlighten the reactionary and bourgeois elements of their enemies. But that will not be easy, as there are many others on Europa who are vying to do the same.

selectable.name: Europa Kingdom
selectable.lore:
FROZEN OCEAN FIASCO
 - Low population
 - Strong enemies
 ? Space based civilization
 + Abundant water
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

EUROPA has always been a fracticious environment, due to the disconnected, subterranean nature of the Moon's habitation ecosystem. The only thing preventing all-out war for the last few decades was the USSF, now relegated to a defensive role in UNITED COLONIES drydocks.

Following this realization, the myriad colonies of Europa organized into cliques representing their interests. The KINGDOM OF EUROPA represents the interests of a new set of Nobles who established themselves in opposition to the EUROPAN COALITION, and they are eager to prove their superiority to their former allies. But that will not be easy, as there are many others on Europa who are vying to do the same.

selectable.name: Lunar Red Army
selectable.lore:
RED REVENGE
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

The LUNAR RED ARMY is a chaotic alliance of sectarian, broadly left-wing interests advocating for an overthrow of capitalist imperialism and a transition towards a socialist state of being. Like its counterparts on Earth and Mars, it's enemy is a reactionary force who seeks to prevent this from happening.

According to the Red Army, the Red cause is just not because its victory is inevitable, though it is, as prophesized by the intellectual titans of the past, but because it is the natural and right state of human existence. In space, however, this doctrine is more difficult to enforce, since a single lapse in judgement can render a colony in grave danger. As a result, certain undesirable restrictions on individual liberty must unfortunately be enacted so as to ensure a smooth transition into Utopia, which will be any day now according to our great and noble leader!

selectable.name: Mars ANcapistan
selectable.lore:
FREE ASSOCIATION
 -- Very low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Stable
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL
This country is recommended for new players

Early Mars was, for the most part, driven by the principle of free association. As a result, humanity has colonized this barren rock in only 50 years. Unfortunately, the lazy socialists and incompetent aristocrats have already siezed upon the opportunity provided by prosperity, and undermined the very principles which created it, everywhere except here.
The FREE ENTERPRISE ZONE was established by people with a common ambition: to make mankind truly free, not the liberation of communism, or the "freedom" of liberalism, but, as he is in nature, absolutely free to pursue his ambitions insofar as they do not oppress others.

selectable.name: Mars Germanyt
selectable.lore:
LAST MAN STANDING
 -- Very low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Stable
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL
This country is recommended for new players

GERMANY has a tumultuous history full of great victories and terrible defeats, but one of the often overlooked parts of this is that of the German Empire, which united a group of divided principalities and built an empire to rival the might of the British at the height of their power.
Like the rest of Europe, Germany was transformed into something we no longer recognize as the Fatherland, and thus new living space is required for the survival of the German people.
NEW POMMERANIA was a settlement on Mars built for the explicit purpose of providing safehaven for those fleeing political pursecution in Old Germany, and those that flocked to the promise of a new, traditional Germany will not be let down.

selectable.name: League of Blood
selectable.lore:
RED REVENGE
 - Very low population
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

The RED PLANET ALLIANCE is a chaotic alliance of sectarian, broadly left-wing interests advocating for an overthrow of capitalist imperialism and a transition towards a socialist state of being. Like its counterparts on Earth and Mars, it's enemy is a reactionary force who seeks to prevent this from happening.

According to the League, the Red cause is just not because its victory is inevitable, though it is, as prophesized by the intellectual titans of the past, but because it is the natural and right state of human existence. In space, however, this doctrine is more difficult to enforce, since a single lapse in judgement can render a colony in grave danger. As a result, certain undesirable restrictions on individual liberty must unfortunately be enacted so as to ensure a smooth transition into Utopia, which will be any day now according to our great and noble leader!

selectable.name: Mars roman empire
selectable.lore:
HEIR TO THE EMPIRE
 -- Very low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Stable
 + Expansion opportunities
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL
This country is recommended for new players

The ROMAN EMPIRE was the greatest civilization the world has ever known, lasting for over one thousand years, only being destroyed by the petty betrayal of its allies. Many nations have tried to recreate the glory of Rome but so far none have succeeded- and that is because they were not willing to go far enough to achieve victory.
We descendants of the Roman legacy have done away with our old cultures, beliefs, and ideas in order to understand and wield the power the Romans once held, and although our journey has only just begun, we are absolutely committed to the mission.

selectable.name: Republic of China
selectable.lore:
MIDDLE KINGDOM MADNESS
 + Expansion opportunities
 + High population
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

TAIWAN was in many ways the catalyst for WORLD WAR III, being constantly bullied by the mainland until March 21, 2062, while the Americans appeared at their weakest. What followed was a grueling disaster for both sides, and in the end, neither would claim victory.

After the war, China broke apart into many warring factions, as it often does. Taiwan initially tried to stay out of the fighting, but was soon roped in by a reborn REPUBLIC OF CHINA in Guangdong, and has joined with nearby provinces to return order and justice to China under their own banner.

Of course, the CCP's remnants will not allow that to happen if they can, and are actively working to prevent CHINA from unifying under any flag other than their own.

selectable.name: Russia
selectable.lore:
MOTHERLAND UNDER SIEGE
 + Abundant resources
 ? Unreliable allies
 -- Very strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

Ever since the fall of the SOVIET UNION, Russia has been in a steep decline, complete collapse only staved off by a series of autocratic leaders. In the Early 21st Century, Vladimir Putin embarked on a campaign of expansion to ensure the Russian heartland could not be threatened, but even he could not have envisioned the tribulation Russia would soon endure.

WORLD WAR III was a mixed bag for the Russians, as they did not gain anything from the war, they did successfully realign themselves against the rising EUROPEAN UNION with the UNITED STATES, but with the fall of the latter and apotheosis of the former, Russia finds itself in a predicament whose magnitude reaches even the winter of 1941.

Russia's diplomats have produced a hasty solution: the QUADRILATERAL ALLIANCE, borne primarily of convenience and mutual enemy, to pursue the interests of the remaining independent states in Europe against those who claim to represent them. Only time will tell whether or not this alliance will be able to thwart the Council's plans.

selectable.name: Saturnian League
selectable.lore:
ANTI-CORPORATE CRUSADE
 ? Isolated
 ? Low Population
 - Low Stability
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: MODERATE

The arrival of prototype cryo-sleeper CRONUS I to the Saturn System in 2074 would be the last conquest of the UNITED STATES SPACE FORCE, indeed, the Union would fall only a few years after the Titanian colonists awoke from their decades long slumber. Fortunately, Titan proved more hosptable than initially anticipated, as preliminary surveys revealed a great wealth of ice hidden beneath the surface, which would prove useful in constructing the PATRIOT'S SCHILD outpost on the southern shores of Titan's Methan seas.

However, not all was peaceful, as the retreat of the USSF to its Martian and Lunar holdings emboldened the JOVIAN CORPORATIONS to restart their rampant exploitation- and they were very keen to open up the emerging Saturnian market. In 2086, TRICORP sponsored a "business venture" on Enceladus, which quickly turned into an Empire-building project similar to that of Europa, where the companies began buying influence within the emerging Saturnian legislature. Fortunately, the Titanians found resolve where the Europans could not, and united to drive out the undue influence of the emerging megacorporation, allowing for the establishment of the SATURNIAN LEAGUE OF WORLDS - a project with the aim of ridding the ringed planet of all corporate influence.

selectable.name: The Protectorate
selectable.lore:
LIKE FATHERLAND, LIKE SON
 - Low population
 ? Space based civilization
 + Weak enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL
This country is recommended for new players

Following the disaster of WORD WAR III, and the CCP's loss of power, the few Chinese colonies on the moon and mars were left with decaying infrastructure, poor population, and even poorer finances, having long relied upon the Party's saber-rattling to keep enemies at bay, and the results were disastrous.

THE PROTECTORATE is the last of the colonies to retain its power, and finds itself in a tense standoff with Manchu and Indochinese rebels, with the additional threat of future tensions with the UNITED COLONIES, once they stabilize the situation in the northern hemisphere.

selectable.name: Thule
selectable.lore:
NAZIS ON THE MOON
 + Expansion opportunities
 + Stable
 - Strong Enemies
 - Space based civilization
 - Low population
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

Being the first of the extraplanetary nations, the LUNA CONFEDERATION is well accustomed to isolation, as for a time it was declared "non-existent" by the United Nations convention on Space Settlement in 2059. Its political history has been similarly placid, with the disgraced "Unity and Prosperity" party holding office with near complete hegemony until 2085.

The Thule National Party was at first a group of extremist thinkers, exiled from Europe during the waning days of its liberal government. They went first to America, and then were exiled again to the Moon, where only their brothers would accept them.

Perhaps that wasn't the greatest idea, or maybe it was. If you were to ask such a question today in one of Germania's habitats, you might find yourself mysteriously ceasing to exist due to strange, as of yet unknown cosmic phenomena.

THULE, as it is now, is utterly and fanatically devoted to the reversal of the "GREAT BETRAYAL" that the people of Europe have suffered at the hands of their leadership, who, according to the venerable Supreme Leader, are part of a great scheme to destroy Europe and her people.

selectable.name: TRICORP
selectable.lore:
CORPORATE KINGDOM
 - Low population
 ? Space based civilization
 ? Isolated
 + Abundant resources
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: EASY

TRICORP™ is the creation of the recent merger of Ganymede's "Big Three" corporations into one Megaconglomerate, established for the expressed purpose of monopolizing the wealth of ALL of Jupiter. Such behaviors would ordinarily be shut down by international agencies such as the JUPITER AUTHORITY, however, Tricorp™ has a secret backer: the EUROPEAN ECONOMIC ZONE. Why the European Communists would want Tricorp™ to succeed is not known to their executives, but they don't really care. Money is power, and power is all that is real..

selectable.name: Turkety
selectable.lore:
ISLAMIC THUNDERDOME
 + Expansion opportunities
 - Strong enemies
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

The collapse of global order after WORLD WAR III allowed many nations to establish themselves in a way unthinkable before, and this includes those in Earth's powderkeg: the Middle East.

TURKEY is one of three powers attempting to establish dominion over the heartland of Islam, and must outcompete its rivals if it wants to survive this century.

selectable.name: United COlonies
selectable.lore:
MAYFLOWER COMPACT
 + Stronger than neighbors
 - Space based civilization
 - Low population
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: NORMAL

The UNITED COLONIES represents the vast majority of the colonial possessions of the former United States in the wider Solar System, being comprised primarily of the Armstrong Colony on Luna, and the Olympus colony of Mars.

Under the Republic, these colonies were made safe by the watchful eye of the United States Space Force, which once patrolled the way between Earth and Mars. But when the suzerain was tearing itself apart, its colonies threatened to do likewise, with appendages of the REVOLUTIONARY FRONT in the RED PLANET ALLIANCE and the LUNAR RED ARMY took the chaos as a signal to similarly wreak havoc on the Colonies.

Desperate for order, and unable to tackle the threat alone, the colonies united, and now face the future together, and restore a great American Republic like the days of old.

selectable.name: Venerean Federation
selectable.lore:
NO REST FOR THE RUSSIANS
 - Low Population
 -- Venus Start
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

Russian history is a series of blunders in which many people die. This is Russia's greatest strength, and weakness. It has given us great determination and skill in resisting the inevitable, and now it once again proves very useful.

Russia's VENERA exploration missions to Venus uncovered a world with no equal, the ultimate in harsh climates, in desolate frontiers; in short, the perfect place for the Russian people. As such, great effort was made by the motherland to send expeditions to this place, to make it livable. This investment was intended to give Russia greater bargaining power against Europe back home, by showing the Europeans we would be willing to endure any hardship to win, should they try the unthinkable.

Instead, the colonists were trapped by history, as is so often the case. America's achilles heel finally broke the behemoth, and the rest of the Solar System found itself cut off from Earth- but we have endured this before, and we will once again learn from this crisis and be better for it!

selectable.name: Venus Enterprise Zone
selectable.lore:
CORPORATE CONTROLLERS
 - Low Population
 -- Venus Start
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

The few corporations which sponsored colonial ventures to Earth's twin were not happy to find that the planet did not have many redeeming qualities for colonial exploitation, unlike mars. Habitation, in order to be safe, had to be built aboard massive airships in the upper atmosphere, where water vapor still lurked and could be collected in massive nets. These proved to be expensive, but there were still those who took such risks.

After the collapse of the United States, some companies with great investment in Venus chose to migrate to the locations of their ventures instead of dealing with either side. These companies arrived to a scene of terror and misery: the whole world had gone mad from the chaos of isolation and confinement on the airships. Order was only restored through the replacement of civil governance with that of corporate mercenaries and tough discipline.

Now, the time has come to bring prosperity and recreational fusion reactors to all of mankind!

selectable.name: Venus Intelligence
selectable.lore:
NO REST FOR THE RUSSIANS
 - Low Population
 -- Venus Start
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

Russian history is a series of blunders in which many people die. This is Russia's greatest strength, and weakness. It has given us great determination and skill in resisting the inevitable, and now it once again proves very useful.

During a raid by Spetsnaz forces against BLACKSITE GAMMA-LAMBDA-PSI of the CIA, we captured documents indicating the Americans had learned the Language of the Human Mainframe: they could now rewrite the mind like a machine.

Knowing this, we naturally questioned how long they had this information, and whether or not we had been programmed already. We came to the realization that all of our thoughts were influenced by the CIA's mental weapons technology, and that the only way to liberate ourselves from their control was through our own SUBLIMATION PROTOCOL.

When we came to the Federation Council with this understanding, they rejected it (predictably), as they had become too entrapped within the CIA's mind-prison. So, naturally, we took over the secluded Rebeyecuian Range and transformed its population into the new and improved HOMO ROBOTICUS!

selectable.name: Venusian United Colonies
selectable.lore:
AFTER THE MOUSE UTOPIA
 - Low Population
 -- Venus Start
OVERALL DIFFICULTY: HARD

VENUS was not colonized by ordinary people, but instead the greatest and worst of the old Earth. On one hand, there were scientists and engineers devoted to the ambition of terraforming the inhospitable world into a second Eden for humanity, and on the other there were those who admired the secrecy and seclusion Venus provided.

This, in combination with the manifested Behavioral Synch of the Venusian colonists, due to their cramped conditions and isolation from Earth, resulted in disastrous consequences. For a time, peace was maintained through force, but that could not stop the crazed masses from tearing each other apart. Venus is a shadow of shadows, perpetual decline imminent, and each colony has taken drastic measures to avert the crisis.

In order to stay sane, we have instituted policy as if the Union were still intact, and have taken great effort to persuade our people as such. We are the only ones who have yet to fall to the mania, and there are fewer of us each day. God help us!
